content.text:
[cron:3a9ddbae-0caf-4fef-a7ba-601535f51461 Smart Compaction — All Sisters] Run smart compaction for all sisters. Execute: cd ~/.openclaw/workspace/tools && .venv/bin/python3 smart_compaction.py --agent all. If any sister is over 50% threshold, the script will dump memories to Postgres and trim files automatically. Report what happened briefly. Reply NO_REPLY if nothing needed attention.
Current time: Wednesday, March 11th, 2026 — 8:01 AM (America/New_York)

Return your summary as plain text; it will be delivered automatically. If the task explicitly calls for messaging a specific external recipient, note who/where it should go instead of sending it yourself.

content.thinking: Running the smart compaction script for all sisters as requested by the cron job.

content.text:
All sisters compacted. Here's the rundown:

| Sister | Context Usage | Action |
|--------|-------------|--------|
| **Main** | 474% | Clean — no dump needed |
| **Recovery** | 673% (highest) | 📤 Dumped 9 memories from 2026-03-10.md to Postgres |
| **Scholar** | 217% | Clean |
| **Forge** | 283% | Clean |
| **Memory** | 199% | Clean |

**Recovery** was the only one that needed attention — 9 memories extracted and archived to Postgres from yesterday's file. Everyone else was already tidy. All five completed successfully.
